channel.title: publications on Guilherme Nakahata
channel.description: Recent content in publications on Guilherme Nakahata

item.title: Publications
item.description:
This page contains a list of my academic publications and ongoing research work.

Conference Papers

2026

A Constructive Method to Build Many Valid Initial Solutions for the Traveling Tournament Problem

Guilherme Nakahata, F. Richoux, D. van den Berg, C. Aranha EvoApplications (EvoApps) — Toulouse, France, 2026

PDF · DOI: 10.1007/978-3-032-23607-4_27 · Repository

Bons-AI: Agent-Based Model for Behavioral Analysis

S. Satake, Guilherme Nakahata, C. Aranha International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS), Cyprus, 2026
